title: 2025.7.10How we built it: Jurisdiction resolution for Stripe TaxSummary:Our new jurisdiction resolution system (JRS) is a faster, less resource-intensive solution to the challenging problem of determining tax obligations in places with complicated, overlapping tax jurisdictions.Authors:Erich RentzDanko KomlenTopics:TaxEngineeringRead
